name: fakoli-crew
description: Thirteen specialist AI agents for software engineering — 8 generalist roles (polyglot architect, code reviewer, researcher, plugin engineer, integration specialist, documentation writer, infrastructure keeper, QA validator) and 5 cross-plugin critics (agent-critic, skill-critic, hook-critic, mcp-critic, structure-critic) — with TDD enforcement, systematic debugging, and verification gates. Work independently or as coordinated crews for complex projects.
